label: Free Local / Self-host
notes: Use browser local storage or your own WebDAV/self-hosted dwebCloud.
Best fit for privacy-first or private deployment users.

label: Hosted Cloud Sync 1000
notes: Hosted write access for up to 1000 OTP entries.
After expiry the space becomes read-only until renewal.
Encrypted data is retained for up to 365 days for export and recovery.
